memberdef.argsstring: (FName SlotBaseName, int32 RevisionOrLatest, FARSaveResult &OutResult, bool bUseDebugSaves=false)
memberdef.name: LoadGame

memberdef.argsstring: (const TArray< uint8 > &SaveBytes, FName SlotBaseName, int32 SlotNumber, FARSaveResult &OutResult)
memberdef.name: PersistCanonicalSaveFromBytes

detaileddescription.para: Enforces listen option so host remains authoritative.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &URL, bool bSkipReadyChecks=false, bool bAbsolute=false, bool bSkipGameNotify=false, bool bPersistSaveBeforeTravel=true)
memberdef.name: RequestServerTravel

briefdescription.para: Authority-only travel helper used by UI/Blueprints.

detaileddescription.para: Flow: optional readiness gate -> capture GameState travel snapshot -> optional disk save -> ServerTravel with enforced listen option.

briefdescription.para: GameInstance subsystem that owns save/load/list/delete plus travel-save orchestration.
